commands: vp exec -c 'basename $(pwd)' # cwd is package root
cd src && vp exec -c 'basename $(pwd)' # cwd preserved in subdirectory
cd src/nested && vp exec -c 'basename $(pwd)' # cwd preserved in nested subdirectory
cd src && vp exec node -e "const p = require('path'); console.log(p.basename(process.cwd()))" # non-shell mode also preserves cwd
